steps.title: Convert the units
steps.content:
Convert meters to miles and seconds squared to minutes squared. Since $1$ mile is $1{,}609$ meters and $1$ minute is $60$ seconds, multiply by $60^2$ for the time conversion:
$$
3.2\cdot \frac{1}{1{,}609}\cdot 60^2
$$

steps.title: Evaluate the rate
steps.content: Compute the converted rate: $$\frac{3.2\cdot 3{,}600}{1{,}609}=\frac{11{,}520}{1{,}609}$$ This is about $7.16$. Rounded to the nearest tenth, this is $7.2$ miles per minute squared. The answer is B.
